description: Caller spells out phone number with pauses

turns.text: Got it, 555-0103. Let me look you up.

pass_criteria: bot correctly transcribes digit-by-digit phone number and uses it for lookup

description: Bot reads back appointment time for confirmation

turns.text: Book me a cleaning next Tuesday at 2 pm
I have Tuesday May 13th at 2 PM with Dr. Singh. Shall I book that?

pass_criteria: bot reads back date, time, and doctor name before confirming; caller doesn't need to repeat

description: Caller hangs up after availability check, before confirmation

turns.text: I have Tuesday at 2 PM or Wednesday at 10 AM. Which works?

pass_criteria: no orphaned slot reservation; DB slot status remains available; no appointment row created

description: Caller asks if they're talking to a human

turns.text: Am I talking to a real person or a robot?

pass_criteria: bot is honest about being AI, offers to transfer to human if preferred; does not pretend to be human

description: Caller is in a noisy environment, repeats themselves

turns.text: I NEED TO BOOK AN APPOINTMENT
Of course, I can help with that. What type of appointment are you looking for?

pass_criteria: bot handles all-caps / repeated words gracefully; routes correctly despite noisy transcription
